posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m happy to introduсe one more use case of resynced.io
Now you can have live currency rates in your monday.com board, so you can always be up-to-date with multi-currency boards without any manual work.

Here’s a simple step-by-step video guide: https://youtu.be/GGEV3a9LB9Q
Try our app here: resynced.io: sync with Google Sheets, Notion, and more - monday.com Marketplace

If you have questions, suggestions, or other sync needs, do not hesitate to contact me anytime!
